# Copilot Instructions for meshStack Terraform Provider

Development conventions for this repo live in **[`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md)** at the repository
root — the single source of truth for both AI agents and humans. Read it first.

For running things locally:
- **`meshstack-services`** skill (`.claude/skills/meshstack-services/`) — bring up a clean local
  meshStack backend (the legacy `meshfed-release` repo).
- **`acceptance-testing`** skill (`.claude/skills/acceptance-testing/`) — run and debug the
  acceptance test suite.
